behavioral_slices.description: Persisted client appstate routes backed by native Nim state and sync account_data events.
evidence: tests/test_entrypoint_compat.nim: filter and account-data path parsers cover stable client routes
tests/test_entrypoint_compat.nim: account data is persisted and tombstones sync as deltas
tests/test_entrypoint_compat.nim: filters are persisted per user and filter id
tests/test_entrypoint_compat.nim: tag path parsers cover stable client routes
tests/test_entrypoint_compat.nim: tags are backed by m.tag account data and sync deltas

behavioral_slices.description: Persisted client device-management routes backed by native Nim device metadata and token removal.
evidence: tests/test_entrypoint_compat.nim: device path parsers cover collection, detail, and bulk delete
tests/test_entrypoint_compat.nim: device metadata follows token lifecycle and persists

behavioral_slices.description: Client room ephemeral routes backed by native Nim typing, receipt, and fully-read account-data state.
evidence: tests/test_entrypoint_compat.nim: typing, receipt, and read-marker path parsers cover stable client routes
tests/test_entrypoint_compat.nim: typing state emits active and cleared ephemeral sync events
tests/test_entrypoint_compat.nim: receipt records are grouped for sync and persisted

behavioral_slices.description: Persisted local presence routes with shared-room visibility and sync presence events.
evidence: tests/test_entrypoint_compat.nim: presence path parser covers stable client routes
tests/test_entrypoint_compat.nim: presence records persist and sync only to users sharing rooms

behavioral_slices.description: Client profile routes backed by native Nim user profile state, including display name, avatar, blurhash, timezone, and custom profile fields.
evidence: tests/test_entrypoint_compat.nim: profile path parser covers stable and unstable field routes
tests/test_entrypoint_compat.nim: profile fields include blurhash timezone custom keys and persistence

behavioral_slices.description: Client room history routes backed by native Nim timeline and room state, including event lookup, context windows, aliases, member-event filters, and message pagination.
evidence: tests/test_entrypoint_compat.nim: room event path parser covers event and context routes
tests/test_entrypoint_compat.nim: room history helpers expose aliases context members and state-keyed events
manual HTTP smoke: register/createRoom/send plus GET room event, context, aliases, members?membership=join, and messages

behavioral_slices.description: Persisted client pusher and push-rule routes backed by native Nim per-user appstate.
evidence: tests/test_entrypoint_compat.nim: client compatibility path parsers cover remaining local route families
tests/test_entrypoint_compat.nim: pushers and push rules persist Matrix client appstate

behavioral_slices.description: Matrix-shaped client compatibility shells that avoid registered-route 501s for local client workflows while deeper federation, backup, E2EE, and room graph semantics are still incomplete.
evidence: tests/test_entrypoint_compat.nim: client compatibility path parsers cover remaining local route families
tests/test_entrypoint_compat.nim: client compatibility payloads return Matrix-shaped empty or local state

manual HTTP smoke: real tuwunel binary served register, createRoom, joined_rooms, publicRooms, typing, send, receipt, presence, sync, keys upload/query, search, pushrules, pushers, notifications, and turnServer without M_NOT_YET_IMPLEMENTED
